from morpho.cell import Cell
from morpho.program import GrowthProgram
from morpho.state import SimulationState
from morpho.simulation import Simulation
from morpho.interpreter import interpret, describe_program
from morpho.forces import compute_repulsion, compute_adhesion, compute_noise
from morpho.division import handle_divisions
from morpho.constraints import apply_bounds
from morpho.utils import normalise, build_spatial_grid
import numpy as np

# Quick smoke test: seed + 10 steps

print\(describe_program\(program\)\)

seed = Cell\(position=np.zeros\(3\), radius=0.4, growth_rate=0.05, division_radius=1.0, stiffness=1.0, adhesion=0.5\)
state = SimulationState\(program=program\)
state.add_cell\(seed\)
sim = Simulation\(state=state, dt=0.1, damping=0.75\)
sim.run\(steps=30, verbose=False\)
print\(f'After 30 steps: {state.n_cells} cells, t={state.time:.1f}s'\)
print\('Core simulation logic: OK'\)

Bash(cd "/mnt/c/Users/SajcS/Desktop/Living works by the word/morphogenetic-designer" && python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from morpho.cell import Cell
from morpho.program import GrowthProgram
from morpho.state import SimulationState
from morpho.simulation import Simulation
from morpho.interpreter import interpret
from morpho.geometry import cells_to_mesh
from morpho.export import export_mesh
import numpy as np

program = interpret\('grow upward with branching and thick core'\)

seed = Cell\(position=np.zeros\(3\), radius=0.4, growth_rate=0.05, division_radius=1.0, stiffness=1.0, adhesion=0.5\)
state = SimulationState\(program=program\)
state.add_cell\(seed\)
sim = Simulation\(state=state, dt=0.1, damping=0.75\)
sim.run\(steps=120, verbose=True, report_every=20\)
print\(f'Final: {state.n_cells} cells, t={state.time:.1f}s'\)

print\('Generating mesh...'\)
mesh = cells_to_mesh\(state, subdivisions=2\)
print\(f'Mesh: {len\(mesh.vertices\)} vertices, {len\(mesh.faces\)} faces'\)

out = export_mesh\(mesh, 'organism.obj'\)
print\(f'Saved: {out}'\)
")

import sys, time
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from morpho.cell import Cell
from morpho.program import GrowthProgram
from morpho.state import SimulationState
from morpho.simulation import Simulation
from morpho.interpreter import interpret
import numpy as np

program = interpret\('grow upward with branching and thick core'\)
seed = Cell\(position=np.zeros\(3\), radius=0.4, growth_rate=0.05, division_radius=1.0, stiffness=1.0, adhesion=0.5\)
state = SimulationState\(program=program\)
state.add_cell\(seed\)
sim = Simulation\(state=state, dt=0.1, damping=0.75\)

# Time just 10 steps
t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
sim.run\(steps=10, verbose=False\)
print\(f'10 steps, {state.n_cells} cells: {time.perf_counter\(\)-t0:.3f}s'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/mnt/c/Users/SajcS/Desktop/Living works by the word/morphogenetic-designer" && timeout 30 python3 -c "
import sys, time
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import trimesh, trimesh.creation
import numpy as np

# Time building 100 icospheres and concatenating
spheres = []
for i in range\(100\):
    s = trimesh.creation.icosphere\(subdivisions=2, radius=0.5\)
    s.apply_translation\(np.random.randn\(3\)*3\)
    spheres.append\(s\)

t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
combined = trimesh.util.concatenate\(spheres\)
print\(f'Concatenate 100 spheres: {time.perf_counter\(\)-t0:.3f}s, {len\(combined.faces\)} faces'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/mnt/c/Users/SajcS/Desktop/Living works by the word/morphogenetic-designer" && timeout 120 python3 -c "
import sys, time
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from morpho.cell import Cell
from morpho.program import GrowthProgram
from morpho.state import SimulationState
from morpho.simulation import Simulation
from morpho.interpreter import interpret
import numpy as np

program = interpret\('grow upward with branching and thick core'\)
seed = Cell\(position=np.zeros\(3\), radius=0.4, growth_rate=0.05, division_radius=1.0, stiffness=1.0, adhesion=0.5\)
state = SimulationState\(program=program\)
state.add_cell\(seed\)
sim = Simulation\(state=state, dt=0.1, damping=0.75\)

for checkpoint in [10, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100, 120]:
    steps_to_run = checkpoint - \(sim._step_count\)
    t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
    sim.run\(steps=steps_to_run, verbose=False\)
    elapsed = time.perf_counter\(\) - t0
    print\(f'step {checkpoint:3d}: {state.n_cells:4d} cells, last batch={elapsed:.3f}s'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/mnt/c/Users/SajcS/Desktop/Living works by the word/morphogenetic-designer" && timeout 60 python3 -c "
import sys, time
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from morpho.cell import Cell
from morpho.state import SimulationState
from morpho.simulation import Simulation
from morpho.interpreter import interpret
import numpy as np

program = interpret\('grow upward with branching and thick core'\)
seed = Cell\(position=np.zeros\(3\), radius=0.4, growth_rate=0.05, division_radius=1.0, stiffness=1.0, adhesion=0.5\)
state = SimulationState\(program=program\)
state.add_cell\(seed\)
sim = Simulation\(state=state, dt=0.1, damping=0.75\)

t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
for checkpoint in [20, 40, 60, 80, 100, 120]:
    steps_to_run = checkpoint - sim._step_count
    sim.run\(steps=steps_to_run, verbose=False\)
    elapsed = time.perf_counter\(\) - t0
    print\(f'step {checkpoint:3d}: {state.n_cells:4d} cells, total={elapsed:.2f}s'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/mnt/c/Users/SajcS/Desktop/Living works by the word/morphogenetic-designer" && timeout 120 python3 -c "
import sys, time
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from morpho.cell import Cell
from morpho.state import SimulationState
from morpho.simulation import Simulation
from morpho.interpreter import interpret, describe_program
from morpho.geometry import cells_to_mesh
from morpho.export import export_mesh
import numpy as np

program = interpret\('grow upward with branching and thick core'\)
print\(describe_program\(program\)\)
print\(\)

seed = Cell\(position=np.zeros\(3\), radius=0.4, growth_rate=0.05, division_radius=1.0, stiffness=1.0, adhesion=0.5\)
state = SimulationState\(program=program\)
state.add_cell\(seed\)
sim = Simulation\(state=state, dt=0.1, damping=0.75\)

t0 = time.perf_counter\(\)
sim.run\(steps=120, verbose=True, report_every=20\)
print\(f'Simulation: {time.perf_counter\(\)-t0:.2f}s, {state.n_cells} cells'\)

print\('Generating mesh...'\)
t1 = time.perf_counter\(\)
mesh = cells_to_mesh\(state, subdivisions=2\)
print\(f'Mesh: {len\(mesh.vertices\)} vertices, {len\(mesh.faces\)} faces \({time.perf_counter\(\)-t1:.2f}s\)'\)

out = export_mesh\(mesh, 'organism.obj'\)
print\(f'Saved: {out}'\)
print\('SUCCESS'\)
" 2>&1)
